doc_content.summary: Multi-agent PR code review skill orchestrating 3 LLMs (Claude, Codex, Gemini) across 6 domains with an autonomous fix-and-test loop. Executes in isolated Git worktrees, classifies findings to filter out noise, autonomously repairs actionable issues while verifying against test baselines, and generates detailed diagnostics for prompt tuning.
key_features: Parallel multi-agent dispatch via subprocess (18 sub-agents total)
Isolated execution in local git worktrees to protect operator state
Autonomous fix-build-test loop with baseline regression checking
Advanced noise classification and misalignment root-cause analysis
Automated bug issue creation for critical unresolved findings
Strict observability protocols with checkpointing and task synchronization

alt_text: Architecture and data flow visualization of the stark-review skill showing the multi-agent PR review process, including setup, the autonomous review-fix loop across 3 LLMs in isolated worktrees, noise classification, summary generation, and GitHub issue creation phases.
